# Magic

<!-- source: PDF p.73 -->

## The Paths of Magical Power

<!-- p.73 -->

## The Schools of Magical Research

<!-- p.73 -->

### Access to Magic Spells

<!-- p.74 -->

### Combined Paths

<!-- p.74 -->

## Empowerment

<!-- p.74 -->

## Indirect Magic

<!-- p.74 -->

## Types of spells

<!-- p.75 -->

### Battle Magic

<!-- p.75 -->

#### Interrupts

<!-- p.75 -->

#### Battle Magic mechanics

<!-- p.75 -->

#### Fatigue

<!-- p.76 -->

### Rituals

<!-- p.76 -->

### Global Enchantments

<!-- p.77 -->

#### Dispelling global enchantments

<!-- p.77 -->

#### Dispel mechanics

<!-- p.77 -->

#### Protection vs global enchantments

<!-- p.78 -->

#### Grand Communions

<!-- p.78 -->

## Communions

<!-- p.78 -->

### Level bonus

<!-- p.78 -->

### Fatigue distribution

<!-- p.78 -->

### Definition of participant

<!-- p.78 -->

### Communal Chants

<!-- p.79 -->

### Different Communions

<!-- p.79 -->

## Magic Gems

<!-- p.79 -->

### Managing your magic resources

<!-- p.79 -->

### Using magic gems in combat

<!-- p.79 -->

## Research

<!-- p.80 -->

### Legendary Spells

<!-- p.80 -->

## Magic Items

<!-- p.80 -->

## Divine Magic

<!-- p.81 -->

## Alchemy

<!-- p.81 -->


::: callout-note
Transcription pending.
:::
